channel.title: leereilly/games Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: leereilly/games Aug 18th, 2018
item.description:
Puzzle/card/board

  • nudokustars183 - ncurses based CLI sudoku game

item.title: leereilly/games Aug 13th, 2018
item.description:
RPG

  • OpenMWstars3.6k - Reimplementation of the Morrowind game engine.

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 9th, 2018
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Hex 2048stars6 - Hexgrid-based clone of 2048. Play it now!
  • BitBotstars42 - HTML/JS game where you control a bot, which must sense, plan, and act.
  • BlicblockJSstars13 - JavaScript game based on Blicblock in The Sims 4. Match tetrominoes to clear the board.
  • Genetic Driftstars12 - Victor, an annoyed janitor dealing with a lot of annoyed clones and the problems that inevitably arise from genetic duplication. Will he make it home to feed his faithful pet companion?.
  • Lost! Beneath the Surfacestars3 - You're a firefly lost in the dark, beneath the surface and must find a way out of the mazes created by the horrors in the dark.
  • Prismstars22 - Match all the colors.
  • Sliding Puzzlestars14 - Sliding blocks puzzle game.
  • Matching Pairsstars15 - Made in HTML5 using Phaser as the framework, original assets and generated music.

    • Boardgame

  • Kriegspielstars15 - The game of imperfect information, the Kriegspiel chess variant.

    • Arcade

  • Breakoutstars18 - Breakout multiplayer with HTML5.
  • Ceros Snakestars2 - A remake of the iconic 70's Snake game.
  • Circus Charliestars46 - HTML5 tribute created in Phaser.
  • Crappy Birdstars31 - Flappy Bird clone in JavaScript and Canvas2D API.
  • Diggerstars46 - HTML5 version of a Boulderdash game.
  • Drakonasstars10 - Classic shoot 'em up game build with the Three.js library.
  • Emberwindstars248 - HTML5 port of the indie platform game Emberwind.
  • ExecutiveManstars74 - JavaScript MegaMan clone.
  • Flappy Birdstars173 - flappy bird in html5.
  • Mario 5 HTMLstars412 - Infinite Mario in HTML5 JavaScript - using Canvas and Audio elements.
  • Masonry JavaScript Tetris Clonestars10 - Tetris clone created using HTML5/JavaScript/Phaser.
  • Protocol 390stars19 - To survive in People's Park, you must supply the prophet with change.
  • Raging Gardensstars24 - Javascript/HTML5 web browser game where a a hungry (ninja) rabbit farts too often.
  • Space Crusadestars8 - HTML5 game developped with PhaserJS Framework.
  • zedinvadersstars5 - Game is based on our original comic ZED, seen inside "zero-episode" called "Game Over".

    • RPG

  • Roguishstars60 - RPG/Rogue-like game created in JavaScript.
  • Room for Changestars132 - Randomly generated action RPG.

    • Strategy

  • Freeciv-webstars1.6k - An turn-based strategy game implemented in HTML5.
  • Tower Defensestars66 - 3D Tower Defense build with Three.js in HTML5.

    • Racing

  • Trigger Rally Online Editionstars203 - Fast arcade rally racing.

    • Others

  • Descensus 2stars11 - A TypeScript 2D physics game.
  • CyberPongstars3 - Unusual Ping Pong game, adaptable with Makey Makey Kit.
  • Squirtsstars20 - Well-known indie game implemented in JavaScript.

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 7th, 2018
item.description:
Just The Source

  • System Shockstars1.4k - Source code for original System Shock game (PowerMac version), more readable fork available herestars30.

    • Strategy

  • OpenDungeonsstars378 - Open source game inspired by Dungeon Keeper - Dark, damp and dangerous...

item.title: leereilly/games May 5th, 2017
item.description:
Arcade

  • Coffee Snakestars26 - HTML5 snake game written in CoffeeScript. Play it now!
  • Phaser Snakestars3 - JavaScript version of the snake game, created using the Phaser Engine.

    • Others

  • Beaststars25 - An homage to the 1984 ASCII game "BEAST" from Dan Baker, Alan Brown, Mark Hamilton and Derrick Shadel written in node. You have to squash little ASCII beasts between pushable blocks but watch you to not be eaten by them.

    • Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • itchstars1.6k - An electron cross-platform game downloader, installer, and library manager for itch.io written in TypeScript.
  • Mudletstars437 - A cross-platform, open source, and super fast MUD (text-only MMORPGs) client with scripting in Lua.

    • IOS

  • Choose Figurestars33 - Simple logic game. Choose the right figure. Train your attention.

    • Platform

  • HFT Mario Partystars33 - a remixed local multiplayer reimagining of the original Mario Bros.

    • FPS

  • OpenLarastars2.6k - Tomb Raider open-source engine Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 29th, 2017
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Sudoku JSstars14 - A Sudoku puzzle game with a clean design and mobile devices in mind. Play it now

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 18th, 2017
item.description:
Arcade

  • FullScreenMario – a free HTML 5 remake of Super Mario Bros with additional features.
  • OSGGstars8 - Oldskool Gravity Game, very difficult lander game in glorious vector graphics.
  • SDL-Ballstars7 - Pretty looking breakout clone available in most distributions.

    • RPG

  • The Legend of Zelda: Mystery of Solarus DXstars161 - sequel to The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past released on the SNES, written in lua and created with the Solarusstars676 engine

    • Puzzle/card/board

  • 2048-in-terminalstars92 - CLI version of the game 2048 made right.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Solarusstars676 - An Action-RPG game engine written in C++.

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 15th, 2017
item.description:
Strategy

  • OpenFodderstars329 - Open-source implementation of Cannon Fodder

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 10th, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • HaxeFlixelstars1.4k - Free, cross-platform 2D game engine powered by Haxe and OpenFL http://www.haxeflixel.com/

    • Platform

  • Sky Enginestars6 - Custom engine 2D platform game made with OpenGL.

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 29th, 2017
item.description:
Strategy

  • Hexa Battlestars49 - A turn based dungeon crawler written with Typescript, using React and SVG. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 28th, 2017
item.description:
FPS

  • BananaBreadstars1.2k - Port of the Cube 2/Sauerbraten 3D game engine/first person shooter to the web, compiling C++ and OpenGL to JavaScript and WebGL using Emscripten. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 25th, 2017
item.description:
Strategy

  • Ancient Beaststars920 - Materialize and control beasts in order to defeat your opponents! Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 6th, 2017
item.description:
Arcade

  • Snake_newstars16 - Classic nokia snake game using web. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 4th, 2017
item.description:
Sandbox

  • Project Cube - Voxel game based on Minecraft made with HTML5. Play it now!
  • Cube Enginestars148 - 3D engine completely written in HTML5 without OpenGL. Play it now!

    • Boardgame

  • 3D Hartwing Chess Setstars397 - 3D chess game done in HTML/CSS/JS. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 27th, 2017
item.description:
MMORPG

  • Tap Tap Adventure - Expansion of BrowserQuest. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Dec 29th, 2016
item.description:
Point and Click

  • The Housestars108 – You're in a strange house. Can you find the way out? Is there any? Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Nov 10th, 2016
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Wurfel Enginestars78 An isometric game engine for games with an open world made of blocks or voxels.

item.title: leereilly/games Nov 8th, 2016
item.description:
Programming

  • CengBallstars20 - Soccer programming game with 2D simulation.

item.title: leereilly/games Nov 4th, 2016
item.description:
Arcade

  • Square Off!stars7 - multiplayer 1v1 air-hockey style game, place squares to deflect the ball. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 30th, 2016
item.description:
Puzzle

  • TransCubestars226 - 2d puzzle platformer based on the concept of transforming into different "blocks", with their unique properties, and making you way to the end of the level with the provided transformations. Play it now!
  • Orbiumstars82 - Modern version of the 90's game Log!cal. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 28th, 2016
item.description:
RPG

  • Freeablostars2.1k - Open-source implementation of the Diablo I engine.

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 26th, 2016
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Hexahedralstars18 - Push down all the blocks in the minimum number of moves. Play it now!

    • Puzzle/card/board

  • PokerTHstars369 - Implementation of Texas Hold'em supporting (online) multiplayer and botplay. Play it now!

    • Arcade

  • Save The Foreststars6 - Save the burning forest! Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 25th, 2016
item.description:
Strategy

  • Hedgewarsstars356 - A turn based strategy, artillery, action and comedy game.

    • Action

  • OpenTombstars1.1k - An open-source Tomb Raider 1-5 engine remake.

    • Android

  • Colorphunstars78 - ColorPhun is a simple color based Android Game.

    • Arcade

  • Missile Commandstars12 - Missile Command clone in Lua with LÖVE.

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 24th, 2016
item.description:
Strategy

  • KeeperRLstars600 - Roguelike dungeon builder inspired by Dwarf Fortress.

    • Puzzle

  • A Dark Roomstars5.3k - Minimalist Text Adventure game written in JavaScript. Play it now!
  • Couch 2048stars22 - A physics-based puzzle, loosely related to the original 2048 game. Play it now!

    • RPG

  • Cendricstars224 - Platformer-RPG in a fantasy setting with puzzle elements.
  • Diablo JSstars846 - Isometric minimal-code style game at html5 canvas and javascript. Play it now!

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • OpenRTSstars797 - Real-Time Strategy game 3D engine coded in java 7.
  • ChoiceScriptstars351 - A language/engine for developing text-based multiple-choice interactive novels

    • Chat bots

  • c4botstars22 - Chat bot that plays Connect Four with you, works in web chat, Facebook Messenger, Skype, and Telegram. Play it now!

    • Boardgame

  • c4stars162 - Connect Four game, with AI, in HTML/CSS/JS. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 19th, 2016
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Evennia MUD/MU* Creation Systemstars1.3k - Library for creating online multiplayer text games (MUD, MUSH, MUX, MUCK, MOO etc) in pure Python.

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 14th, 2016
item.description:
Platform

  • Captain Holetoothstars53 - A fun, explorative and story-driven platformer with minigames. Made with the Godot Engine.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Superpowers - TypeScript & ThreeJS powered game engine and framework (2D & 3D with WebGL)

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 10th, 2016
item.description:
Arcade

  • JumpSuitstars47 - a multiplayer space shooter set in a wrapped universe. Play it now!
  • WPilotstars163 - A browser-based remake of the famous XPilot game, built with NodeJS and HTML5

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 30th, 2016
item.description:
RPG

  • Dungeon Crawl Stone Soupstars1.5k - Single-player roguelike dungeon exploration game with a larger focus on combat compared to other popular roguelikes.
  • NetHackstars1.6k - Single-player roguelike dungeon exploration game and one of the most popular games in its genre.

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 27th, 2016
item.description:
Strategy

  • KaM Remakestars283 - RTS game remake of “Knights and Merchants” written in Delphi from scratch.

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 20th, 2016
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Anagramicastars5 - A word game and API for anagrams. Play it now!
  • Shape Experimentstars1 - The shape recognition reflex game. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 16th, 2016
item.description:
Strategy

  • Wargusstars187 - Wargus is a Warcraft2 Mod that allows you to play Warcraft2 with the Stratagus engine.

item.title: leereilly/games Aug 18th, 2016
item.description:
Just The Source

  • Jedi Academystars293 - Jedi Academy source only, mirror of SourceForge from Raven Software.
  • Jedi Outcaststars188 - Jedi Outcast source only, mirror of SourceForge from Raven Software.
  • OpenJKstars1.6k - Community maintained fork of Jedi Academy and Jedi Outcast development.

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 8th, 2016
item.description:
Sandbox

  • Manic Diggerstars236 - A multiplayer block-building voxel game, Minecraft clone.

    • Arcade

  • I Spy A Ghoststars33 - an experimental p2p multiplayer game made in HTML5/Phaser using WebRTC. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 6th, 2016
item.description:
Arcade

  • Spashalstars5 - Danger lurks around every corner in space. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 4th, 2016
item.description:
Arcade

  • Jolly Jumperstars55 - Made in Phaser. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 30th, 2016
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • XLEstars321 - Rendering engine with advanced features such as Image Based Lighting, dynamic area lights, and a node based material editor. Flexible and modular, it is designed to drop into existing solutions. XLE is the "hackable" engine, intended to be customised for specialised requirements.

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 28th, 2016
item.description:
Arcade

  • d3shooterstars12 - Asteroids style game in HTML5 as a demo of the d3 library. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 25th, 2016
item.description:
Arcade

  • hēXōn - A twin-stick-shooter with 3D graphics and a classic feel.

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 15th, 2016
item.description:
IOS

  • Sakura Flystars88 - iOS action game developed using SpriteKit. Available free on the App Store.

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 12th, 2016
item.description:
Arcade

  • Space Shooterstars414 - Cross platform, 2D space shooting game made using pygame.

item.title: leereilly/games Jan 28th, 2016
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • libSDL2ppstars395 - C++11 bindings for SDL 2.0.

item.title: leereilly/games Jan 25th, 2016
item.description:
Others

  • OpenNotriumstars66 - Open source version of Notrium, a top-down survival game.

item.title: leereilly/games Jan 17th, 2016
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Astrystars380 - WebGL maze game built with Three.js and Box2dWeb. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Dec 29th, 2015
item.description:
Android

  • Memory Gamestars531 - Simple and beautiful memory game for kids.

item.title: leereilly/games Dec 23rd, 2015
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • QICI Enginestars764 - free JavaScript game engine library with a web-based comprehensive suite of toolset for making HTML5 games.
  • Atomic Enginestars2.4k - features 2D and 3D rendering, standards compliant JavaScript, full Player and Editor source on GitHub, Windows & Mac Editors, with deployment to Windows, Mac, WebGL, Android, and iOS from the editor.

item.title: leereilly/games Dec 17th, 2015
item.description:
MMORPG

  • Stendhalstars199 - a fun friendly and free 2D multiplayer online adventure game with an old school feel. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Dec 6th, 2015
item.description:
Android

  • Game of Lifestars82 - Conway's Game of Life with editable rules

item.title: leereilly/games Nov 22nd, 2015
item.description:
FPS

  • GlPortalstars300 - A modern 3D game and engine with portals written in C++.

item.title: leereilly/games Nov 1st, 2015
item.description:
Puzzle/card/board

  • Castles of Dr. Creepstars16 - The Castles of Dr. Creep

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 23rd, 2015
item.description:
Arcade

  • Witch Blaststars174 - Roguelite dungeon crawl shooter similar to The Binding of Isaac.

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 21st, 2015
item.description:
Sandbox

  • Rigs of Rodsstars603 - Soft-Body physics simulator for vehicles and more.

item.title: leereilly/games Oct 9th, 2015
item.description:
Strategy

  • OpenTTDstars3.3k - OpenTTD is a transport simulation game based upon the popular game Transport Tycoon Deluxe, written by Chris Sawyer.

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 29th, 2015
item.description:
Arcade

  • Duckmarinesstars87 - A ChuChu Rocket remake for PC.

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 18th, 2015
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Ren'pystars2.3k - A Visual Novel Engine, written in python, for both mobile (iOS beta) and desktop platforms.

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 14th, 2015
item.description:
FPS

  • Freedoomstars580 - Free software FPS based on the classic Doom engine.

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 13th, 2015
item.description:
Puzzle

  • cube-composerstars1.8k - A puzzle game inspired by functional programming. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 11th, 2015
item.description:
Sandbox

  • Pycraftstars119 - A Minecraft-inspired game for the terminal.

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 10th, 2015
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Maze 3Dstars17 - A 3D maze game. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 7th, 2015
item.description:
Just The Source

  • Aquariastars212 - Breath-taking underwater fantasy game. Winner of the Grand Prize at the 2007 Independent Games Festival.

item.title: leereilly/games Aug 18th, 2015
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • tiledstars8k - Tiled is a general purpose tile map editor. It is meant to be used for editing maps of any tile-based game, be it an RPG, a platformer or a Breakout clone.

    • MMORPG

  • Open Meridianstars113 - The first 3D MMORPG, released in 1996 and open sourced in 2012. Forked in 2013, Actively developed. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Aug 17th, 2015
item.description:
IOS

  • Bat Loves Bugsstars10 - Arcade game about a bug-craving bat.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • jMonkeyEnginestars2.6k - Cutting edge, cross-platform 3D game engine for adventurous Java developers.
  • Oxyginestars705 - C++ engine and framework for 2D games on iOS, Android, Windows, Linux and Mac.
  • GemRBstars622 - Cross-platform implementation of Bioware's Infinity Engine.

item.title: leereilly/games Aug 6th, 2015
item.description:
IOS

  • FinalFighterstars13 - Tank deathmatch battle game developed using Cocos2D.

item.title: leereilly/games Aug 4th, 2015
item.description:
Puzzle/card/board

  • tictactoestars10 - Graphical tic-tac-toe AI which never loses

    • Sandbox

  • Space Engineersstars2.8k - Space Engineers is a voxel-based sandbox game set in an asteroid field in space.

item.title: leereilly/games Aug 3rd, 2015
item.description:
FPS

  • ioquake3stars1.8k - The free software FPS engine that can be used to play Quake 3, or make your own game.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Chilli Worksstars149 - An open source, cross-platform game engine designed for indie developers.

item.title: leereilly/games Jul 19th, 2015
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • JiGSstars37 - Online RPG and Trading Game Engine built in PHP.
  • EaselJSstars7.8k - Library to make working with the Canvas element easier.

item.title: leereilly/games Jul 13th, 2015
item.description:
Arcade

  • Space-Shooterstars6 - A classic shoot'em up space shooter build in HTML5 with multiplayer. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Jul 9th, 2015
item.description:
Arcade

  • Chaos Projectilestars50 - 2D run'n'gun action game with RPG elements.
  • Clonepointstars52 - Libre clone of Gunpoint, a game in which you hack and punch your way to victory.
  • Falling Timestars17 - Arcade game inspired by Fall Down.
  • Kroniaxstars10 - Sidescrolling skill-based game.
  • Mystic Minestars62 - Single and multiplayer action game with mining carts.
  • DynaDungeonsstars165 - Bomberman clone using the awesome open source Godot game engine.
  • Taiseistars454 - Fan-made, open Source clone of the Touhou series.
  • Teeworldsstars1.6k - Online multi-player platform 2D shooter.

    • Platform

  • The Legend of Edgarstars80 - 2D platform game with a persistent world.
  • The Secret Chronicles of Dr. M.stars160 - A 2D platform game in classic style.
  • SuperTuxstars1.1k - Classic 2D jump'n'run sidescroller with Tux.

    • Sandbox

  • Blackvoxelstars73 - Sandbox game based on a molecular voxel interaction engine.
  • The Powder Toystars2.5k - Falling-sand physics sandbox game.

    • Strategy

  • Harrisstars18 - Strategy game based around the actions of RAF Bomber Command in the Second World War.
  • Pax Britannicastars89 - Underwater one-button real-time strategy game.
  • Wyrmsunstars179 - Strategy game based on history, mythology and fiction.
  • MegaGleststars265 - MegaGlest real-time strategy game engine (cross-platform, 3-d).
  • Micropolisstars615 - City-building game based on the original code for SimCity.
  • Colobotstars786 - A real-time strategy game with programmable bots.
  • Curse of Warstars243 - Fast-paced action strategy game with ncurses and SDL frontends.
  • Race into Spacestars107 - Turn-based space race strategy game originally by Interplay.
  • Seven Kingdoms: Ancient Adversariesstars169 - Classic RTS game liberated in 2009.
  • The Battle for Wesnothstars3.2k - Turn-based strategy game with a high fantasy theme.
  • Warzone 2100stars1.8k - Postnuclear realtime strategy.
  • Tanks of Freedomstars898 - Turn-based strategy game in isometric pixel-art style.

    • FPS

  • AssaultCubestars418 - Total conversion of Wouter van Oortmerssen's FPS called Cube.
  • Red Eclipse - Free, casual arena shooter featuring parkour.
  • Smokin' Gunsstars38 - Semi-realistic simulation of the "Old West's" great atmosphere.
  • Turtle Arenastars25 - Third-person action game using the Spearmint engine.
  • Unvanquishedstars599 - Fast-paced, futuristic FPS with RTS elements.
  • Warsow - Fast-paced FPS in a futuristic cartoonish world.

    • Puzzle/card/board

  • Minilensstars116 - Cute puzzle platformer starring a cleaning robot on post-apocalyptic Earth.

    • RPG

  • Angbandstars867 - Single-player dungeon exploration game in the universe of JRR Tolkien.
  • Cataclysm: Dark Days Aheadstars5.1k - Roguelike set in a post-apocalyptic world.
  • Dungeon Monkey Eternalstars48 - Party-based fantasy roguelike role-playing game.
  • Egoboostars83 - Cool 3D dungeon crawling game in the spirit of NetHack.
  • Crystal Picnic - Lighthearted and colourful tribute to the classic era of action RPGs.
  • Monster RPG 2 - Turn-based J-RPG in a fantasy universe.

    • Racing

  • Stunt Rallystars320 - Rally game with Track Editor, based on VDrift and OGRE.
  • SuperTuxKartstars3.2k - Free 3D kart racing game featuring open source mascots.

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 29th, 2015
item.description:
Strategy

  • OpenRCT2stars9.4k - Open source recreation of Rollercoaster Tycoon 2.

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 18th, 2015
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Ending - Roguelike puzzle game. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 17th, 2015
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Urho3Dstars3.5k - Urho3D is a free lightweight, cross-platform 2D and 3D game engine implemented in C++ and released under the MIT license. Greatly inspired by OGRE and Horde3D.

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 12th, 2015
item.description:
Sandbox

  • 3d.citystars1.2k - 3d city builder game. Play it now!

    • Puzzle

  • Blockrain.jsstars855 - Embed & play the classic game on your site. Simple as that. Play it now!

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Oimo.jsstars2.3k - Lightweight 3d physics engine for javascript.

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 11th, 2015
item.description:
MMORPG

  • Meridian 59stars277 - The first 3D MMORPG, released in 1996 and open sourced in 2012. The original codebase for Meridian 59, less frequently updated. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 10th, 2015
item.description:
Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • Brood War APIstars1.4k - C++ framework to interact with the Real Time Strategy (RTS) game Starcraft: Broodwar.

    • Sandbox

  • Endless Skystars2.8k - Space trading and combat game similar to the classic Escape Velocity series.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • libGDXstars18.4k - Desktop/Android/HTML5/iOS Java game development framework.

item.title: leereilly/games May 31st, 2015
item.description:
Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • IodineGBAstars82 - GameBoy Advance emulator written entirely in JavaScript and powered by HTML5.

item.title: leereilly/games May 21st, 2015
item.description:
Others

  • binbstars248 - Competitive, multiplayer, realtime, guess the song game. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 21st, 2015
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Ned Et Les Makistars20 - Puzzle game with isometric 3D graphics inspired by Sokoban. Play it now!

    • Arcade

  • Newton Adventurestars15 - Play Newton, a very special hero who has the power to change gravity direction! Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 13th, 2015
item.description:
Arcade

  • Ball And Wallstars24 - Pure JavaScript arkanoid style game. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 8th, 2015
item.description:
Android

  • Wannabe Tempeststars15 - Clone of 80's coin-op arcade game Tempest(80's arcade game).

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 19th, 2015
item.description:
Strategy

  • Zero-Kstars400 - Open source RTS game with physical projectiles and smart units

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 17th, 2015
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Beatrixstars14 - Music game where you arrange the drums to catch the beats and play the right rhythm. Play it now!
  • Drunken Vikingstars44 - Retrace your drunken rampage in reverse time. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 15th, 2015
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Infectorsstars9 - Sokoban-like puzzle game developed with Phaser. Play it now!

    • Puzzle/card/board

  • EbbeFlutstars2 - Really nice board game implemented in a bad way a VERY long time ago.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • bgfxstars9.3k - Cross-platform rendering library.

    • Arcade

  • Wannabe Tempeststars10 - Tempest(80's arcade game) clone in Java, and a small project for playing with git.

    • Android

  • Green Wallstars21 - Weirdly addictive arcade-style android game, where you fling fruit at a wall. Project developed using Android Studio 1.0.

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 14th, 2015
item.description:
Arcade

  • Captain Rogersstars38 - Captain Rogers: Asteroid Belt of Sirius - HTML5 mobile game created using ImpactJS. Play it now!
  • Release Cyclesstars70 - Abstract racing game where you fight against the clock and the computer to get as far as you can in a product's life-cycle.
  • Super Mario Brosstars137 - Super Mario Bros level one written with Backbone Game Engine. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 12th, 2015
item.description:
Puzzle

  • Paritystars34 - A numbers puzzle game. Play it now!
  • Pondstars46 - A narrow fellow in the Pond. Play it now!
  • Zopstars25 - Connect like colors. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 28th, 2015
item.description:
Others

  • Dental Defender: Saga of the Candy Hordestars30 - HTML5 shooter/tower defense game for the #CandyJam. Play it now!

    • Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • JavaScript Breakoutsstars519 - Collection of JavaScript engine implementations of Breakout.

    • Arcade

  • Drill Bunnystars36 - Written in JavaScript and using the great Phaser library. Play it now!
  • Space Invadersstars62 - Remake of Space Invaders in require.js. Play it now!

    • Platform

  • Elemental Onestars34 - Built with the Phaser HTML5 game framework. Play it now!

    • Strategy

  • Last Colonystars68 - RTS game with both a single player campaign mode as well as a multiplayer mode, created entirely in HTML5 and JavaScript. Play it now!

    • Puzzle

  • Follow me! A Simon Clonestars4 - Fully commented version of the famous game - Simon - in JavaScript, built using Phaser game engine.

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 25th, 2015
item.description:
Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • Greenworksstars1.2k - A node.js/nw.js addon allowing you to integrate HTML5 game with Steamworks.

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 22nd, 2015
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Cocos2d for iPhonestars4.1k - Framework for building 2D games, demos, and other graphical/interactive applications for iPod Touch, iPhone, iPad and Mac. It is based on the cocos2d design but instead of using python it, uses objective-C.
  • Cocos2d for HTML5stars2.7k - Cocos2d for Web Browsers. Built using JavaScript.
  • Cocos2d-xstars15.2k - Multi-platform framework for building 2d games, interactive books, demos and other graphical applications. It is based on cocos2d-iphone, but instead of using Objective-C, it uses C++. It works on iOS, Android, Windows Phone, OS X, Windows and Linux.
  • lycheeJSstars733 - Free HTML5 + native OpenGL Game Engine for Embedded, Console, Mobile, Server and Desktop.
  • PlayCanvasstars6.3k - 3D WebGL game engine with online toolset.
  • CutJSstars2.1k - Lightweight and fast 2D HTML5 rendering engine for cross-platform game development.
  • PhysicsJSstars3.4k - Modular, extendable, and easy-to-use physics engine for JavaScript.
  • Craftystars3k - JavaScript game library that can help you create games in a structured way.
  • panda.jsstars670 - Free HTML5 game engine for mobile and desktop with Canvas and WebGL rendering.
  • kiwi.jsstars1.2k - Blazingly fast mobile & desktop browser based HTML5 game framework. It uses CocoonJS for publishing to the AppStore.

    • Arcade

  • Chromacorestars34 - 2D musical platformer set in a dark, black & white world that progressively becomes more colorful and happy through successful gameplay.
  • Hyperspace Garbage Collectorstars54 - General Hyperspace Waste Management Solutions. Play it now!
  • Color Queststars37 - Infinite runner following a black and white pixel's quest to change into a color pixel. Play it now!
  • Core Commiterstars14 - GitHub Game Off 2012 Entry. Play it now!
  • Mega Girlstars54 - Megaman inspired game. Play it now!
  • Octocat Jumpstars32 - GitHub Game Off 2012 Entry. Play it now!
  • Heal 'em Allstars45 - Imagine, what if the cure exists? What if zombies plague can be stoped? Explore old, abandoned graveyard, heal as many zombies as you can, and find your way out. But be careful not to become one of them. Play it now!
  • Jekyll & Hyde Collidestars24 - Multi-layered infinite side-scroller. Play it now!
  • Custom Tetrisstars77 - Play the classic Tetris game the way you like it. Play it now!
  • CHANG€stars43 - Intense game about the extreme life of supermarket cashiers. Play it now!
  • Avabranchstars50 - GitHub Game Off 2012 entry. Play it now!

    • Puzzle

  • Zokostars89 - 3D version of Sokoban. Play it now!
  • For Kingstars30 - Puzzle platformer game about a king in search for his lost crown. Play it now!
  • Branching Outstars64 - Minimalist game about leaving home. Play it now!
  • Push and Forkstars33 - Puzzle game in which you carry a fork, push blocks, and go back in time.. Play it now!
  • Clone Manstars20 - Puzzle, memory, retro game with simple graphics. Play it now!
  • Swapstars153 - New(award winning) take on the classic tile-based puzzle game, where you change which character you're controlling to reach your goal. Play it now!

    • Others

  • Turkey Cooking Simulatorstars17 - You have been invited to craft the centerpiece of the American thanksgiving dinner, the turkey. Woo your girlfriend / boyfriend and be judged by your future in-laws! Apply your culinary expertise to impress your family. Play it now!
  • Psiralstars58 - JavaScript/HTML5 game, GitHub Game Off 2 winner. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 20th, 2015
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Matter.jsstars11.5k - Matter.js is a JavaScript 2D rigid body physics engine for the web.

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 19th, 2015
item.description:
Arcade

  • DuckHunt JSstars397 - DuckHunt ported to JS and HTML5 with a level creator. Play it now!
  • Alien Invasionstars141 - Demo Game for Mobile HTML5 Game Development. Play it now!
  • Asteroidsstars286 - Pure JavaScript asteroids. Play it now!
  • Cell Matesstars3 - Game made in 48 hours for the 2013 Global Game Jam.
  • Clumsy Birdstars1.3k - Flappy Bird clone in JavaScript using MelonJS. Play it now!
  • Codename Lumberjackstars10 - Simple flash game written using Actionscript 3.0 and Flixel. Play it now!
  • Coilstars39 - HTML5 canvas game where you defeat enemies by wrapping enemies in your trail. Play it now!
  • EKG Runnerstars18 - Game made in 48 hours for the 2013 Global Game Jam.
  • Fluid Table Tennisstars63 - Renders a table tennis game interacting with a full-color real-time fluid simulation at 60 FPS. Play it now!
  • FlxInvadersstars22 - Very simple Flixel game inspired by the Taito classic. Play it now!
  • FlxTeroidsstars14 - Very simple Flixel game inspired by the classic arcade shooter. Play it now!
  • Grave Robbersstars16 - Sort of GIRP-inspired tower defense. Play it now!
  • HotFixstars207 - Help Hotfix collect stargazers and avoid enemies. Collect commits to upgrade hotfix and add new features. Play it now!
  • hurry!stars35 - Small but speedy arcade shooter. Play it now!
  • Marble Soccerstars18 - Marble game for learning three.js.
  • Modestars69 - Small(but sadly not that simple) demo game built on the Flixel framework. Play it now!
  • Monster Wants Candystars57 - Simple HTML5 game created with Phaser 2.0.7. Play it now!
  • Onslaught Arenastars175 - Fight off hordes of classic medieval monsters in this fast paced arcade shooter! Play it now!
  • Pappu Pakiastars439 - Addictive game where you guide little Pappu around obstacles while collecting coins, stars, and berries and avoiding enemies known as Pakias. Play it now!
  • PixelPlatformerstars23 - Simple platformer game that demostrates the power of the Entity game engine.
  • PolyBranchstars163 - Minimalist 3D game. Dodging branches may seem easy at first, but how long can you hold up as you approach terminal velocity? Play it now!
  • Ski Freestars418 - JavaScript port of the classic PC Game, Skifree. Play it now!
  • Snakestars22 - Clone of the classic Snake game. Play it now!
  • SORADES 13Kstars19 - Scrolling shooter in the vein of "Raptor: Call of the Shadows" and "Warning Forever". Play it now!
  • Survivorstars111 - Playable HTML + CSS + JavaScript remake of a space-based "shoot-'em-up" arcade game for Atari / Commodore 64 from 1982, including a level editor and design tool. Play it now!
  • C-Dogs SDLstars441 - Overhead shoot-em-up port of the classic DOS game.
  • Epic Inventorstars92 - Indie, side-scrolling, action, RPG.

    • Boardgame

  • Desperate Godsstars303 - Free online board game that was designed to be played just like a board game in real-life: no rules are enforced by the computer. Play it now!
  • Green Mahjongstars66 - Solitaire mahjong game done in HTML/CSS/JS.
  • Lichessstars9.4k - Free chess game using HTML5 & websockets, built with Scala, Play 2.1, MongoDB and Elasticsearch. Play it now!

    • MMORPG

  • BrowserQueststars8.7k - HTML5/JavaScript multiplayer game experiment. Play it now!

    • Strategy

  • Command & Conquerstars717 - Clone of the popular RTS. Play it now!
  • 0 A.D.stars1.8k - 3D RTS similar to Age of Empires II
  • Caesariastars208 - Remake of the popular citybuilder and economic sim Caesar III.
  • CorsixTHstars2.4k - Clone of Theme Hospital.
  • openagestars10.3k - Clone of the Age of Empires II engine.
  • OpenRAstars9.3k - Open-source implementation of the Red Alert engine using .NET/mono and OpenGL. Runs on Windows, Linux and OSX.
  • OpenXcomstars1.3k - Clone of the original X-COM.
  • PCOTM (Phone Case of the Monster)stars4 - Ruby game, where you play as a phone-collecting monster.
  • Pioneerstars1k - Game of lonely space adventure.
  • Polly-B-Gonestars57 - Physics platform game about a plucky wheeled robot named Polly.
  • Source of Talesstars59 - Entry in the Liberated Pixel Cup 2012.
  • Voxeliqstars154 - Block-based game engine implementation developed with C#.

    • Racing

  • HexGLstars1.2k - Futuristic HTML5 racing game by Thibaut Despoulain using HTML5, Javascript and WebGL. Play it now!

    • Sandbox

  • Blk Gamestars30 - Multiplayer Javascript/WebGL voxel world game demo. Play it now!
  • Craftstars8.6k - Simple Minecraft clone written in C using modern OpenGL.
  • Freeminerstars307 - Sandbox game inspired by Minecraft.
  • Mineteststars6k - Infinite-world block sandbox game with survival and crafting.
  • Terasologystars3.1k - Voxel world game engine inspired by Minecraft and others with fancy graphic effects and a heavy focus on extensibility.

    • Puzzle

  • 0hh0 - Companion game to 0hh1 by Q42. Play it now!
  • 0hh1 - Lovely little logic game by Q42. Play it now!
  • 2048stars10.8k - Sliding addition game Play it now!
  • Hextrisstars1.7k - Addictive puzzle game inspired by Tetris. Play it now!
  • Monkey Rallystars19 - JavaScript game created for the Ludum Dare #28 jam. Play it now!
  • Pop Pop Winstars118 - Implementation of Minesweeper in Dart. Play it now!
  • untrustedstars4.1k - Meta-JavaScript adventure game by Alex Nisnevich and Greg Shuflin. Play it now!

    • Clicker

  • Particle Clickerstars505 - Addictive incremental game that teaches players the history of high energy particle physics. Play it now!

    • Others

  • HeartLinestars2 - Game made in 48 hours for the 2013 Global Game Jam.
  • The Killerstars11 - Flash/ActionScript3-based "nongame". Play it now!

    • RPG

  • Arx Fatalisstars620 - Cross-platform port of Arx Fatalis, a first-person role-playing game.
  • Valyria Tearstars185 - Single-player medieval-fantasy 2D J-RPG.

    • Platform

  • Frogattostars469 - Action-adventure game, starring a certain quixotic frog.
  • Gishstars279 - Award-winning physics platformer.
  • Mario-Level-1stars1.9k - First level of Super Mario Bros made with Python and Pygame.

    • Puzzle/card/board

  • 2048-clistars182 - CLI version of the game 2048 for your Linux terminal.
  • Dominionstars54 - C# implementation of Dominion, a board/card game.
  • IRMINGARDstars5 - Patience card game written in Ruby.
  • PuzzleDashstars10 - Match-3 puzzle game built in the Dash enginestars410.
  • Wizznicstars27 - Most awesome puzzle game.

    • Android

  • Green Mahjongstars66 - Solitaire mahjong game done in HTML/CSS/JS.
  • PuzzleGamestars49 - Slider puzzle game implementation created with Cocos2d for Android.

    • IOS

  • Bridgesstars167 - Puzzle game with bridges, houses, tolls, and subways for iOS.
  • Canabaltstars1.6k - Release of Canabalt for iOS.
  • DrugsNRockstars14 - Simple multiplayer rhythm game designed during the 2013 Global Game Jam.
  • Frogattostars469 - Action-adventure game, starring a certain quixotic frog.
  • Gorillasstars250 - iPhone(or iPod touch) port of the popular old QBasic game.
  • Green Mahjongstars66 - Solitaire mahjong game done in HTML/CSS/JS.
  • Light Jockeystars17 - iOS Auditorium-like game.
  • Lumiostars171 - Puzzle game for iOS developed using Cocos2D. Available free on the App Store.

    • Just The Source

  • Doom 3stars4.2k - Doom 3 GPL source code release.
  • ID Software - Includes Doom, Quake, Wolfenstein and more.
  • MaNGOSstars2.7k - Full featured World of Warcraft server.
  • Miner Wars 2081stars196 - For modders of Miner Wars 2081, a 6DOF action-survival space-shooter simulation-game set in the year 2081.
  • Prince of Persiastars5.4k - Source code for the original Prince of Persia game that was written on the Apple II, in 6502 assembly language, between 1985-89.
  • UFO RUNstars61 - Real time multiplayer with Nextpeer.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Akihabarastars185 - Set of libraries, tools and presets to create pixelated indie-style 8/16-bit era games in Javascript.
  • Allegro 5stars1.2k - C++ libraries to make 2D games(graphics, sound, etc.).
  • ammo.jsstars2.6k - Direct port of the Bullet Physics engine to JavaScript using Emscripten.
  • Babylon.jsstars14k - Complete JavaScript framework for building 3D games with HTML 5 and WebGL.
  • Chipmunk Physicsstars1.6k - Simple, lightweight, fast and portable 2D rigid body physics library written in C.
  • Dashstars410 - Free and open 3D game engine written in D.
  • Dualitystars1.2k - 2D Game Development Framework.
  • EntityJSstars183 - HTML5 JavaScript game engine utlizing the entity-component design.
  • Flashpunkstars377 - Free ActionScript 3 library designed for developing 2D Flash games.
  • Flixelstars1.1k - Game-making library written entirely in ActionScript 3.
  • GameJSstars444 - GameJs is a JavaScript library for writing 2D games or other interactive graphic applications for the HTML Canvas inspired by PyGame.
  • GamePlaystars3.2k - Cross-platform, C++ game framework/engine for creating 2D/3D mobile and desktop games.
  • Godotstars38.6k - Fully featured, MIT licensed, game engine. It focuses on having great tools, and a visual oriented workflow that can export to PC, Mobile and Web platforms with no hassle. The editor, language and APIs are feature rich, yet simple to learn, allowing you to become productive in a matter of hours.
  • melonJSstars3.4k - HTML5 game framework for 2D games.
  • Quasi-Enginestars56 - a QtQuick framework that intends to be a complete toolset to ease 2d game development.
  • SFMLstars6.8k - Simple and Fast Multimedia Library.
  • Springstars2.1k - Real Time Strategy game engine.
  • Tesseractstars177 - Make mapping more fun by using modern dynamic rendering techniques, sothat you can get instant feedback on lighting changes, not just geometry.
  • three.jsstars70.4k - JavaScript 3D library used in many browser games.
  • Torque 2Dstars1.6k - MIT Licensed version of Torque 2D from GarageGames.
  • Torque 3Dstars3.3k - MIT Licensed version of Torque 3D from GarageGames.
  • Turbulenz Enginestars3.2k - HTML5 game engine and server-side APIs available in JavaScript and TypeScript for building and distributing 2D and 3D games.

    • Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • FlxCollisionsstars1 - Simple set of 2d physics + collision demos for flixel v2.0. Play it now!
  • Gamertagstars21 - Gem for retrieving Xbox Live Gamertag information from various sources.
  • Leaderboard(Java)stars23 - Leaderboards backed by Redis(in Java).
  • Leaderboard(PHP)stars25 - Leaderboards backed by Redis(in PHP).
  • Leaderboard(Python)stars19 - Leaderboards backed by Redis(in Python).
  • Leaderboard(Ruby)stars471 - Leaderboards backed by Redis(in Ruby).
  • Leaderboard(Scala)stars9 - Leaderboards backed by Redis (in Scala).
  • libfreenectstars3.2k - Drivers and libraries for the Xbox Kinect device on WIndows, Linux, and OS X.
  • OpenEmustars12.7k - Project to bring game emulation to OS X as a first class citizen.
  • Tassadarstars44 - Starcraft 2 replay parser written in pure Ruby.
  • World of Warcraft Addons - Various World of Warcraft addons written in Lua.
  • World of Warcraft API Docsstars514 - Public documentation for the RESTful web service provided as part of the World of Warcraft community site.

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 16th, 2015
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Flarestars18 - Free/Libre Action Roleplaying Engine.
  • Starlingstars2.3k - ActionScript 3 library that mimics the conventional Flash display tree architecture, can be deployed to mobile devices (iOS, Android), the desktop (Windows, OS X), and to the browser (via the Flash plugin).

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 15th, 2015
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Cocos2d for Androidstars613 - Cocos2d for Android, based on cocos2d-android-0.82, and now ported from cocos2d-iphone 0.99.4.
  • libRocketstars981 - C++ user interface package based on the HTML and CSS standards. It is designed as a complete solution for any project's interface needs.

    • Android

  • Pixel Dungeonstars2.8k - Traditional roguelike game with pixel-art graphics and simple interface.
  • Gidi Gamesstars60 - Lexis, TicTacToe, Puzzlemania - a collection of 3 board games done with Cocos2d for Android.

    • Arcade

  • Arashistars14 - Arashi is a clone of the Arcade game Tempest. Play it now!

item.title: leereilly/games Feb 9th, 2015
item.description:
Others

  • Hauberkstars1.5k - Hauberk is a roguelike, an ASCII-art based procedurally-generated dungeon crawl game. It's written in Dart and runs in your browser.

    • Strategy

  • Unknown Horizons - 2D isometric RTS economic strategy game written in C++ & Python, built on the Flexible Isometric Free Engine.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • pixi.jsstars32.7k - Super fast HTML 5 2D rendering engine that uses webGL with canvas fallback.

item.title: leereilly/games Jan 25th, 2015
item.description:
Sandbox

  • Minecraftstars4.6k - Simple Minecraft-inspired demo written in Python and Pyglet.

item.title: leereilly/games Dec 7th, 2014
item.description:
Arcade

  • Alge's Escapadestars29 - HTML5, JavaScript, GameJs arcade game where you control an Algae. Play it now!

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Phaserstars29.5k - Phaser is a fun, free and fast 2D game framework for making HTML5 games for desktop and mobile web browsers, supporting Canvas and WebGL rendering.

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 9th, 2014
item.description:
Platform

  • Escape of the catstars7 - Hardcore oldschool platformer on INSTEADstars158.

item.title: leereilly/games Sep 4th, 2014
item.description:
FPS

  • LWJake2 - LWJGL port of Quake 2.
  • openspadesstars802 - Compatible client of Ace of Spades 0.75.

    • Platform

  • Commander Geniusstars148 - Commander Keen compatible clone.
  • Journey to the Center of Hawkthornestars969 - This 2d platformer is based on Community's Digital Estate Planning episodebuilt using the LÖVE game engine.

item.title: leereilly/games Aug 27th, 2014
item.description:
RPG

  • Flare RPGstars38 - Fantasy action RPG game with its own engine.

item.title: leereilly/games Jul 22nd, 2014
item.description:
Arcade

  • OpenLieroXstars193 - Liero clone, like realtime Worms, or a 2D Quake.

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 21st, 2014
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Gladiator 3Dstars24 - Canvas based JavaScript ray casting engine for pseudo 3D games.

item.title: leereilly/games May 25th, 2014
item.description:
Arcade

  • Savage Wheelsstars18 - 2D car crashing game similar to the old classic Destruction Derby.

    • Android

  • ChaseWhisplyProjectstars512 - Chase Whisply is a FPS. You have to seek, find and kill the ghosts living around you.

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 30th, 2014
item.description:
IOS

  • Doomstars690 - Doom Classic for iOS.

item.title: leereilly/games Jun 19th, 2013
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Plasmastars154 - Cyan Worlds's Plasma game engine.

item.title: leereilly/games Mar 25th, 2013
item.description:
Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • Bfxrstars802 - Flash + AIR sound effects generator. Based on Sfxr.
  • stats.jsstars7.1k - JavaScript performance monitor.

item.title: leereilly/games Jul 31st, 2012
item.description:
IOS

  • Wolfenstein 3Dstars444 - Wolfenstein 3D for iOS Source Release.

item.title: leereilly/games May 7th, 2012
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • MonoGamestars7.5k - XNA Implementation for Mono based platforms (supports iOS, Android, Linux, and started work on PS Suite and NaCli ).

item.title: leereilly/games Apr 18th, 2012
item.description:
Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • GenesisEnginestars37 - GenesisEngine allows you to create and explore procedurally-generated planetary systems, from ground level all the way out into space. Experiments with procedurally-generated worlds, XNA, and design patterns.

    • Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • Halo::Reach::APIstars14 - Ruby gem for interacting with the Halo:Reach API.
